recommendations.title: Mine Games
recommendations.overview: A group of young friends make an incomprehensible discovery in an abandoned mine, but the more they try to change the future, the more they seal their fate.

recommendations.title: Purple Hearts
recommendations.overview: An aspiring musician agrees to a marriage of convenience with a soon-to-deploy Marine, but a tragedy soon turns their fake relationship all too real.

recommendations.title: The Hidden Face
recommendations.overview: A Spanish orchestra conductor deals with the mysterious disappearance of his girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Those Who Wish Me Dead

recommendations.title: Blackadder: Back & Forth
recommendations.genres: Comedy, History, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: What was a cunning plan from Lord Edmund Blackadder V to fake a time machine on his gullibly incompetent friends, turns out to be the real thing and hurls him and his imbecile underling, Baldrick, through the course of human history.
